title: Premier Housewares Strawberry Fields 100% Cotton Single Oven Glove, Red
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 100% cotton oven glove that is durable for everyday use
Allows you to remove your meals from the oven safely and with ease
Features hanging loop for easy and compact storage
H x W x D: 31 x 20 x 3 cm
description: Product Description Protect yourself from burns when picking up hot dishes using the Strawberry Fields oven glove. Stylish and practical, the glove will make a fantastic addition to your kitchen. 100% cotton with mixed fibre fillings help to keep your hand safe from burns when you need to remove a dish from the oven. The length will help shield part of your arm for added protection. A fun red strawberry design is accentuated against the crisp white that will look fantastic hanging in your kitchen. Machine washable, the Strawberry Fields oven glove is perfect for everyday use and with its beautiful design, it will make a stylish and practical addition in your kitchen. The Premier Kitchen portfolio is a comprehensive range of coordinating products for the kitchen and dining area, featuring contemporary, functional products, as well as traditional, practical pieces. From dinner sets and glassware to knife sets and chopping boards, Premier has something to suit every style and budget. Create an efficient and practical kitchen area with Premier’s collection of storage solutions, preparation utensils, tableware, cookware and kitchen accessories. Box Contains 1 x Premier Housewares Strawberry Fields 100% Cotton Single Oven Glove
